en.bio: Experienced Full-stack Web Developer and Project Manager with a solid track record in managing and delivering complex web projects. Skilled in Vue, Nuxt.js, React, Node.js, Go, Python, and various databases. Strong project management and client relations skills, backed by a Master's degree in Management Engineering.

it.bio: Sviluppatore Web Full-stack e Project Manager con esperienza consolidata nella realizzazione e gestione di progetti web complessi. Competenze in Vue, Nuxt.js, React, Node.js, Go, Python e diversi database. Solide capacità di project management e gestione delle relazioni con i clienti, supportate da una Laurea Magistrale in Ingegneria Gestionale.
